title: Publish State & Release Discipline
release_discipline: Public delivery is not the same as preview readiness.
Preview lane remains isolated for regression checks and controlled upgrades.
Only approved sections should advance toward published release surfaces.
Production lane carries explicit state instead of implicit operator assumptions.

items.notes: Central production dashboard is now under explicit release discipline.
Archive / history lane is ready for stricter publish-state handling.
Locale-aware structure is tracked under release-grade state transitions.
Newsletter binding is ready to connect into later delivery integration.
Voice prep stays controlled while delivery hooks and audio publishing are staged later.
